reviews.review_description: I got to day 154 (about 40 to 50% complete), and decided to abandon the game. I've enjoyed what I've experienced. It's definitely a very unique game with OTT British humour similar to Monty Python? I enjoyed it but it would not be to a lot of ppls taste (especially as it differs to American humour). The role of being a Studio Director mixing video streams under pressure was fun for a while but became repetitive, as did the humour, so it was best to stop while ahead.
I Like the fact that we have so many choices just in the jb, and how this deeply changes things. That's just one of the many reasons!!

The game succeeds more in its political messaging than anything else. It really shows you know how the media can influence opinions and how stuff behind the scenes is not as it seems.

The gameplay loop felt a bit boring after a while, though. It just felt like I was doing a job. I suppose that's what the game is about, so I can't complain too much. I would say it's one of the best news producer job sims out there, though! It really did feel like it was my job to manage the news. 

The game was more british than I thought it would be. It feels more like British satire then anything else.

I didn't really like the message pop-ups in between the gameplay where it tells you more about the players' personal lives. They were just boring and took me away from the experience.

The acting and some of the musical plays were really good, though. 

Overall, I thought it was alright. I thought it was a bit overhyped when it first came out for a flat screen. It's definitely something different that I haven't seen another game do before, though. And it definitely made me feel like a news reporter. Just nothing exceptional.
I'd LOVE a continuation of the story, one of the best ever!! Apart from that the acting was just as great aswell and the game in general was absolute fun.
I got this game a few days ago and I already love it would recommend for the price it is at very cheap

First of all, absolutely love the game, so much so that I already want to play more. I saw that there were DLCs for the pc game and wondered if they were ported to the vr game. Unfortunately, it was not, which is why I’m writing this review. Notgames, if you see this, PLEASE add the DLCs to the vr game! I REALLY wanna know more of the NFB story myself other than look it up on YouTube or other social media platform! But… other than that rant, it’s a great game, definitely buy it! You will not regret it!
This is something unlike you ever experienced!! Pay attention ! Sure to be a pleaser!!

This game is so addictive. I am aiming to complete all 14 endings.  I majored in communications in college, so this game reminded me of the good ol' days behind the mixer. This game also shows how society can be swayed based on what the media presents to them. Five stars!
Is a good game
the game wasn't made for vr and it shows in some of the menus that don't give you the ability to rewind, mute, etc but overall amazing game with a great story and fun gameplay

reviews.review_title: There are some issues, but I like it
reviews.review_description:
"I find it really fun to play; however, there are some issues with this version. For example, I can't use any buttons on the TV in the archive. So, I can't rewind, fast forward, or mute some of the TV screens. I also can't access the 'disrupt hacks' section.

By the way, when does the DLC come out on the VR version? I find it more fun to play on VR than on the PC, so I hope that it comes to VR as well."

Never heard of this game before, and watching the trailers I thought this game was a bit weird. Thank god I bought it though. Surprisingly very fast game to learn when there’s so much buttons and controls. And it’s a great hilarious and dark story. I actually bought the PC version too to experience the game better because my eyes usually hurting when I look at something for too long. I only played halfway through the VR version so far, but I can definitely say it’s more immersive than the PC Version.

reviews.review_title: One of the best FMV games but...
reviews.review_description: One of the best Full Motion Video games I have ever played.   Decisions on video selections had consequences in the future so decisions seemed to matter.   But for me the game was way too depressing and preachy at times.   FMV sections were quite good but the multiple choice items in between seemed choppy and weren't very interesting.   The video switching aspects of the game seemed realistic.   The consequences of some of the gov't actions in the game though didn't ring true and the game seemed to wallow in this kind of satiric area then kind of limped into the finish.     So for me it was like a depressing but good movie that you never want to see again.     Can't recommend it and not sure that I will even keep it on my system.
Great game so far, but the interference controls are bugged, making the control knob hard to control, and it's always getting pushed up with the slightest movement, which is tanking my overall score

For me I can start a. New game but it nice I get to the loading screen it won’t start I’ve tried  rebooting and clearing data

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry to hear that. We are currently investigating this issue and working on a fix. We will notify you as soon as it goes live! We sincerely hope you can give Not For Broadcast another shot once the update is live.

Meanwhile, playing it on your Primary account may solve the issue for you, in case you played it on an account that is set up as Secondary on your Quest headset.

UPD:
Patch is out! Please update the game and let us know if it works for you now. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: The tracking is pissing me off
reviews.review_description:
The interference control is having issues and I am tired of it not registering which way I twist the knob or it is grabbing the wrong thing. This game needed more work before releasing it. 

 This problem is killing the experience.

reviews.review_title: This game kills just like the vaccine
reviews.review_description: It's caught me off guard that there was a newscaster named Alan James who's a conspiracy theorist and you could tell it was total knock off of Alex Jones I love Alex Jones and have him tattooed he is Saving Lives as I am saving lives by warning people not to take the vaccine or be into the LGBT that is meant to confuse her children we never heard of the word myocarditis till everybody starts in the vaccine be safe

The frequency knob can go to the hot place tho! I had to move it to the easiest setting because it was too much … ong complaint. And the mutant monkeys with their added stress cracks me up. The film clips are funny too. I am never bored but I have rage quit over the freaking frequency knob.  Almost all green but I can’t seem to get that dialed in . . . But I am entertained . So good job! Lots of details and I feel like this is meant for ADHD lol . Now I gaze off and I know I have a thing and it pops me back .

Sadly this game used to be good but now it's gone pretty bad. I keep on getting stuck on the loading screen when I finish the uprising and when I reset the game it completely freezes my headset I'm hoping that they make a patch 3 but for now I can't play this game at all because of how glitchy it really is
